---
title: "README"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-19"
---

[**Dataset:**]{.underline}

The used dataset is sourced from the the health report of the Robert-Koch-Institut (<https://github.com/robert-koch-institut/Gesundheitsberichterstattung_-_Daten_zu_nichtuebertragbaren_Erkrankungen?tab=CC-BY-4.0-1-ov-file#readme>) and contains various health data of people in Germany over several decades.

[**Research Questions:**]{.underline}

1.  How did depressive symptoms develop over time and do depressive symptoms correlate with social support in different regions of Germany?
2.  What are differences in depressive symptoms between people of different educational levels? And did depressive symptoms of the most educated group decrease?

[**Authors:**]{.underline}

Lisa Knoff and Leonardo Stefanidi
